channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Daily Zimbabwe Weather + Tsumo
channel.description: Daily weather forecast for Zimbabwe's main cities plus the Tsumo yezuva (proverb of the day). One item per day, dedicated for the Mutapa Times weather autolist.

item.title: Zim weather 4 Jun: Harare mainly clear · high 22° / low 11°
item.description: Harare: high 22°, low 11° (mainly clear) · Bulawayo: high 23°, low 10° (mainly clear) · Mutare: high 23°, low 11° (mainly clear) · Gweru: high 23°, low 10° (clear sky) · Masvingo: high 24°, low 11° (partly cloudy) · Victoria Falls: high 28°, low 11° (clear sky) Tsumo yezuva: Harisi zuva rimwe guru rakasakara. (The great baobab did not grow in a single day.) #Zimbabwe #Weather #ZimbabweWeather #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
